subject: [PATCH] btrfs: btrfs_log_dev_io_error() on all bio errors

reviews.author: Christoph Hellwig
reviews.summary: Indicated that he was still in the exploration phase and suggested logging extra errors, but also mentioned that only a few status codes were considered real I/O errors.
reviews.raw_body:
The work week is almost over, and I'm still in the explore and
experimentation phase.  So please go ahead and log extra error,
although traditionally only BLK_STS_IOERR, BLK_STS_PROTECTION and
BLK_STS_MEDIUM are real I/O ero I/O error.  The rest is unexpected
here, and maybe just logging a message about that would make sense
here.

2026-03-27.patch_summary: This patch modifies the btrfs_log_dev_io_error() function to log device I/O errors for all bio status codes, not just BLK_STS_IOERR and BLK_STS_TARGET as previously done. The change is motivated by a desire to provide more accurate error logging and avoid misleading conclusions about system behavior.
